# X3 Chain Starter: Polkadot SDK L2

## Upstream

- <https://paritytech.github.io/polkadot-sdk/master/polkadot_sdk_docs/polkadot_sdk/templates/index.html>

## Goal

Bootstrap a Polkadot-compatible Layer 2/rollup baseline for X3 Chain settlement integration.

## Checklist

1. Select an upstream L2/rollup-oriented template.
2. Pin upstream commit/tag and record it.
3. Configure bridge/settlement endpoints for X3 Chain integration.
4. Define fraud/validity and finality assumptions in docs.
5. Add integration tests against local X3 Chain RPC.
